---
title: "Notes"
author: "Juan Rocha"

output: html_document
---


**J260410**

[x] Re-run simulations in server:
    - Null model: control all nodes, expectation is to recover all
    - Degree-rank: same amount as control set, but only max degree nodes
    - script 07 provides both parametrization options
    - currently only testing on pollution model
[x] simulations_null: results downloaded for first option
[x] simulations_degree: results downloaded for second option

The results are on old computer, but the results of the actual pollution and resource
experiments are in the new computer.

*J230818*

- Simulations are up and running for pollution system with an experimental design
with 96 different settings. But right now it only tests one net per setting,
I need replicates to gain confidence on the stats.
